basicDetails.implementingAgency: Uttarakhand State Council For Science And Technology

schemeContent.briefDescription: It aims to promote hands-on learning in science, technology, engineering, and mathematics by establishing labs across all blocks, giving students and teachers practical exposure to STEM experiments.
schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme “STEM Lab” is implemented by the Uttarakhand State Council for Science and Technology (UCOST) under the Science and Technology, Government of Uttarakhand. It aims to promote hands-on learning in science, technology, engineering, and mathematics by establishing labs across all blocks, giving students and teachers practical exposure to STEM experiments.
schemeContent.benefits_md: STEM labs are being established in all the blocks of the state, through which students and teachers will be provided with information about experiments in science, technology, engineering, and mathematics.

children.text: The scheme “STEM Lab” is implemented by the Uttarakhand State Council for Science and Technology (UCOST) under the Science and Technology, Government of Uttarakhand. It aims to promote hands-on learning in science, technology, engineering, and mathematics by establishing labs across all blocks, giving students and teachers practical exposure to STEM experiments.

STEM labs are being established in all the blocks of the state, through which students and teachers will be provided with information about experiments in science, technology, engineering, and mathematics.
Interested students may contact their respective schools to participate and avail benefits through training and workshops.

applicationProcess.process_md: Interested students may contact their respective schools to participate and avail benefits through training and workshops.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant must be a student enrolled in a school located in Uttarakhand.

children.text: The applicant must be a student enrolled in a school located in Uttarakhand.
